summary: Cab booking platform with Customer, Driver, and Admin dashboards. Fixing conditional rendering of pickup/drop fields in Customer Dashboard booking form per strict visibility rules.
architectural_notes: Pickup manual fields (pincode + area) visibility depends ONLY on pickupLocationMode === 'manual'; never on journeyType.
Drop fields visibility depends ONLY on journeyType and returnToSamePickup; never on pickupLocationMode.
Roundtrip: show 'Return to same pickup' toggle (default TRUE); when ON, hide drop fields and mirror pickup values in UI state only (no backend schema change).
GPS failure/denial must set pickupLocationMode = 'manual' to restore manual pickup fields; do not rebuild GPS permission logic.
Driver/Admin pages must not be touched during booking form patches.

existing_features.title: In RideRequestForm.tsx, fix pickup manual field visibility so that Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area Name inputs are shown if and only if pickupLocationMode === 'manual', and hidden if pickupLocationMode === 'gps'. This visibility rule must be completely independent of journeyType — do not gate these fields on trip type or journey type in any way.

In RideRequestForm.tsx, fix drop field visibility so that: (a) when journeyType === 'oneway', Drop Pincode and Drop Area Name inputs are always shown as required; (b) when journeyType === 'roundtrip', a checkbox/toggle labeled 'Return to same pickup location' is shown (default checked/true). If returnToSamePickup is true, hide Drop Pincode and Drop Area Name and set their UI state values equal to the current pickup values (no backend schema change). If returnToSamePickup is false, show Drop Pincode and Drop Area Name as required. Drop field visibility must never depend on pickupLocationMode.

In RideRequestForm.tsx, in the existing GPS capture error/failure handler (do not rebuild GPS logic), ensure that when geolocation permission is denied or the geolocation API call fails, pickupLocationMode is set to 'manual'. This causes the pickup manual fields to re-appear automatically via the rule in REQ-1.
